subject: Chemistry
question: According to Markonikov's rule,
option1: Halogen is added to that carbon which contain least number of hydrogen atoms while Hydrogen is added to that carbon which contain greater number of hydrogen atoms
option2: Halogen is added to that carbon which contain greater number of hydrogen atoms while Hydrogen is added to that carbon which contain least number of hydrogen atoms
option3: Halogen is added to that carbon which contain least number of hydrogen atoms while Hydrogen is added to that carbon which contain least number of hydrogen atoms
option4: Halogen is added to that carbon which contain greater number of hydrogen atoms while Hydrogen is added to that carbon which contain greater number of hydrogen atoms
remarks: Correct answer is "Halogen is added to that carbon which contain least number of hydrogen atoms while Hydrogen is added to that carbon which contain greater number of hydrogen atoms"
